schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide a common platform for officers, teachers, and students from universities, colleges, schools, and other departments to actively participate and gain knowledge about the simplified curriculum of Vedic Mathematics and its easy-to-apply methods.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “One-day Seminar on Vedic Mathematics” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Sanskrit Academy, Haridwar, under the Department of Sanskrit Education, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide a common platform for officers, teachers, and students from universities, colleges, schools, and other departments to actively participate and gain knowledge about the simplified curriculum of Vedic Mathematics and its easy-to-apply methods.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Participants of the seminar will gain knowledge about the simplified course of Vedic Mathematics and learn its easy and practical methods.

children.text: The scheme “One-day Seminar on Vedic Mathematics” is implemented by the Uttarakhand Sanskrit Academy, Haridwar, under the Department of Sanskrit Education, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide a common platform for officers, teachers, and students from universities, colleges, schools, and other departments to actively participate and gain knowledge about the simplified curriculum of Vedic Mathematics and its easy-to-apply methods.
Participants of the seminar will gain knowledge about the simplified course of Vedic Mathematics and learn its easy and practical methods.
After finalizing the date, time, and venue of the seminar, the convener will submit the list of invitees, who will then be formally invited through letters issued by the Academy Secretary.

applicationProcess.process_md: After finalizing the date, time, and venue of the seminar, the convener will submit the list of invitees, who will then be formally invited through letters issued by the Academy Secretary.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. Officers, teachers, and students from universities, colleges, schools, and other departments are eligible to participate in the seminar.

children.text: Officers, teachers, and students from universities, colleges, schools, and other departments are eligible to participate in the seminar.
